case_title: THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA VS. DOROTHEA YIP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA C/O UNITED TRUSTEE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT YIP, DOROTHEA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA C/O UNITED TRUSTEE SERVICES YIP, DOROTHEA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR NEW TRIAL: MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DOROTHEA YIP IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUL-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LISA CHAPMAN. DEFENDANT DOROTHEA YIP-KIM IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY A NON CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTEPRETER JEFF KIM. MR. KIM WAS GIVEN THE INTEPRETER'S OATH BY THE DEPUTY COURT CLERK R.SAHATJAN. THE PLAINTIFF REQUEST A CONTINUANCE TO PREPARE FOR THE CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DOROTHEA YIP. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRIAL RESET TO APR-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-06-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 - SERVED FEB-23-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YIP, DOROTHEA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA C/O UNITED TRUSTEE SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA C/O UNITED TRUSTEE SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YIP, DOROTHEA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE (FILED USING FORM SC-150) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA C/O UNITED TRUSTEE SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-24-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT YIP, DOROTHEA HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CANDLESTICK POINT - THE COVE HOA C/O UNITED TRUSTEE SERVICES
